'''âj-y-b-h''' ('''kajaybehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exacerbate|exacerbate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exacerbate|exacerbate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-y-b-h
|-
! Lemma
| kajaybehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijaybehoko|thijaybehoko]] || [[word:jijaybehoko|jijaybehoko]] || [[word:shijaybehoko|shijaybehoko]] || [[word:kijaybehoko|kijaybehoko]]
|-

|-
